title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 12 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 12 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 12 2026
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 12/02/2026
Iron ore futures showed an overall weak trend today, with the main contract I2605eventually closing at 762 RMB/ton, down 0.2% from the previous trading day. Spot prices remained largely flat compared to the previous session. Traders were generally less enthusiastic in quoting prices, while steel mills showed limited inquiry activity.
